caption: Hey loves! ☀️ Just grabbed this on the terrace at Café Mar in Santorini while the breeze hit us both 😳 Spring air is everything and I'm ready to soak up every second of this freedom. Feeling so light, so free... who's joining me for an espresso? 🌸🥂 #SpringVibes #SantoriniEscape #Wanderlust #SunKissed
